quote: Remember, I’ll always be here for you, even if you can’t see me, because I love you.
speaker: Chilli

quote: How can you two come from the same parents, be raised in the same house, but be completely different?
speaker: Bandit speaking about Bluey and Bingo

quote: He has to accept that he’s getting older and needs to look after himself. … I’m his daughter. He should take care of himself for me because … I still need him.
speaker: Chilli

quote: It was the ’80s; mums were allowed to be mean.
speaker: Bandit

quote: ’Flowers may bloom again, but a person never has the chance to be young again.’
speaker: Bandit reading a fortune cookie

quote: Mums go to work, while dads stay home and mow the lawn.
speaker: Indy

quote: “Yes, and if you want me to stay your wife, you’ll learn about dishwashers.” “Dishwasher. Wife. Wow. There’s just so much to learn.”
speaker: Chilli and Bandit

quote: Look, I just want us to use nice words so everyone thinks we’re a nice family.
speaker: Chilli

quote: “Well, why can’t she just not suck her thumb?” “She will one day. Just don’t give up on her, okay?”
speaker: Bluey and Chilli about Muffin

quote: You know how I said you’re the most special kid in the world? … Well, you’re not. … I mean, you are to me and your mum. We love you more than anything. But you’re probably not special to everyone else.
speaker: Stripe

quote: Sometimes special people come into our lives, stay for a bit, and then they have to go … but the bit where they were here was happy, wasn’t it?
speaker: Chilli

quote: “I promise not to start until you’re ready.” “And I promise I’ll be ready when you start.”
speaker: Bluey and Mackenzie

quote: Bingo is my friend now. And I hope we’re friends forever and ever and ever.
speaker: Lila

quote: When Lila is happy, I’m happy.
speaker: Bingo

quote: “If you asked Winnie’s dad to be your friend, do you think he would say yes?” “Well, I don’t know. Maybe.” “If you weren’t my dad, I’d want to be your friend.”
speaker: Bluey and Bandit

quote: “How many friends have you got?” “Oh, um … three?”
speaker: Bingo and Aunt Frisky

quote: Just be patient, children. Your buddies haven’t forgotten you.
speaker: Calypso

quote: Your legs don’t get as tired when you’re having fun.
speaker: Chilli
tags: being a kid and growing up

quote: Run your own race.
speaker: Chilli
tags: being a kid and growing up

quote: “But is it true or not true? I need to know.” “Well, I guess you have to decide: Do you believe in fairytales?”
speaker: Bluey and Bandit
tags: being a kid and growing up

quote: The world’s a magical place!
speaker: Chilli
tags: being a kid and growing up

quote: “Have a cry.” “Check.” “Pick myself up.” “Check.” “Dust myself off.” “Check.” “And keep going.”
speaker: Bingo and Bluey
tags: being a kid and growing up

quote: In this version of Musical Statues, there’s no winner or loser. It’s not about getting to the end, or getting to the weekend, or the forever weekend. It’s a musical thing. You’re just supposed to dance while the music’s being played.
speaker: Chilli
tags: being a kid and growing up

quote: Maybe you just saw something you wanted.
speaker: Bingo
tags: being a kid and growing up

quote: You know what, Bingo? I think you’re getting quite good at losing.
speaker: Chilli
tags: being a kid and growing up

quote: I have to go, I’m a big girl now.
speaker: Bingo
tags: being a kid and growing up

quote: People should play with you because they want to, not because you make them.
speaker: Chilli
tags: being a kid and growing up

quote: It’s my fault, Bluey. I’m just a small, forgettable child.
speaker: Bingo
tags: being a kid and growing up

quote: Look, Bluey, sometimes you’re just gonna be bored.
speaker: Chilli
tags: being a kid and growing up

quote: Keep practicing, you’ll get better. Just don’t ever give up.
speaker: Chilli’s mum

quote: You have to be the bravest you’ve ever been.
speaker: Bluey

quote: As you grow up, you’ll face harder things than a cricket ball, and you’ll have two choices: back away and get out, or step in front and play a pull shot.
speaker: Rusty’s dad

quote: You gotta take the good with the bad, kid.
speaker: Chilli

quote: Hey, frozen Bingo. If I’ve ever hurt your feelings, I’m really sorry, mate. Must feel really bad when your dad does that. Just know that I love you, kid, and I’d do anything for you.
speaker: Bandit

quote: “It’s hard when you don’t win.” “Yes. It is.”
speaker: Chilli and Bingo

quote: Obstacles do not block the path. They are the path.
speaker: Bandit

quote: “Well, I think you have to do it.” “Even though I don’t want to?”
speaker: Bingo and Mackenzie’s mum

quote: “I think I want to beat Dad fair and square.” “It will taste so much sweeter when you win fair and square.”
speaker: Bingo and Chilli

quote: “But how can I know for sure it won’t happen again?” “You can’t. But, you have to give it a go anyway.”
speaker: Bluey and Aunt Frisky

quote: I was just saying that to help you be brave.
speaker: Chilli to Bluey

quote: There’s something you need to know … you’re doing great.
speaker: Bella to Chilli

quote: Work on their heads later. For now, just hearts.
speaker: Chilli

quote: I need 20 minutes where no one comes near me.
speaker: Chilli

quote: We all fail mum school sometimes … we can just start again tomorrow.
speaker: Chilli

quote: “I remember when you used to take me swimming here … that was a long time ago.” “No, it was yesterday.”
speaker: Chilli and Grandad

quote: I feel like you hog all the parenting.
speaker: Stripe to Trixie

quote: You don’t need someone keeping score of your mothering.
speaker: Chilli

quote: “Were you proud of me for rolling over so soon?” “Yes, a little too proud. I think I may have turned into a bit of a show-off.”
speaker: Bluey and Chilli

quote: “It’s not as good as the one in the picture.” “You’re right. It isn’t … but it’s pretty good for a 7-year-old.”
speaker: Chilli and Chilli’s mum

quote: “These kids are nuts.” “Well, I know where they get it from.”
speaker: Bandit and Chilli

quote: I made an omelette for Dad, but I didn’t make it the right way … I need your help making another one.
speaker: Chilli to Bingo

quote: “Why was I rolling?” “I don’t know, kid, you didn’t come with instructions.”
speaker: Bluey and Chilli

quote: My new parenting book says not to boss the kids around … it says here we should let them make their own decisions.
speaker: Bandit

quote: “I’m sorry, I may have forgotten how to be romance.” “Well, I have too. It’s not easy when you’re tired all the time.” “Yeah, and when you get interrupted every 5—”
speaker: Bandit and Chilli

quote: “So try and be a sister worth copying.” “Okay, I will. I’ll be the best big sister I can be.”
speaker: Chilli and Bluey

quote: I think this will do you some good. All holiday you’ve been mean to your little brother … this is a chance for you to have a good think about it.
speaker: Chris Heeler

quote: “Can I have a turn now, Bluey?” “No problem … because we know what happens when you hog.”
speaker: Bingo and Bluey

quote: Remember, the truth will set you free.
speaker: Chilli

quote: “Oh, what? Does [Bingo] miss her old room?” “No … it’s not the room.”
speaker: Bandit to Chilli

quote: “You’ll probably have a better chance of winning with your dad.” “No, I want us to win … because big sisters don’t always beat little sisters.”
speaker: Stripe and Bingo

quote: Bluey, you always never take turns with me. You just take all of the turns! And it makes me feel sad.
speaker: Bingo

quote: Do you want to be right, or do you want Bingo to keep playing?
speaker: Chilli

quote: Rusty could have smashed it into next week if he wanted to. But instead he hit his little sister a catch.
speaker: Bandit

quote: I’ll tell you this for free. My life would be a lot easier if you were both the same.
speaker: Bandit to Bingo and Bluey

quote: I’m so happy you’re not talking over Bingo … but if you talk for her, she won’t find [her voice] either.
speaker: Chilli to Bluey

quote: I’m not taking advice from a cartoon dog.
speaker: Bandit

quote: It’s called a tactical wee.
speaker: Bingo

quote: Magic Claw has no children. His days are free and easy.
speaker: Bandit

quote: This is what happens when you’re unhappy with what you’ve got; someone’s husband eventually gets it!
speaker: Chilli

quote: Pomeranians are a small but hardy breed.
speaker: Pom Pom

quote: Enemies! Bark at them! It’s not working!
speaker: Bluey

quote: My bad mood is making me eat chocolate.
speaker: Bingo

quote: Help! I cuddled a cactus!
speaker: Snickers

quote: And I sort of just talk all the time. It doesn’t even need to make sense. Just noises are fine.
speaker: Bluey

quote: “Someone has to go in there.” “But it stinks so much we’ll die!”
speaker: Bluey and Bingo

quote: You need to be more romance.
speaker: Bluey

quote: There’s something Auntie Brandy wants more than anything as well, but she can’t have it. And there’s not really anything anyone can do.
speaker: Chilli

quote: “What did she give you?” “Everything.”
speaker: Chilli and Bandit

quote: Look, we were all learning to do things for the first time. I just felt like I was doing everything wrong.
speaker: Chilli

quote: “How does a room make you cry?” “Well, I guess it’s not the room. It’s who’s been in it.”
speaker: Bluey and Chilli

quote: I don’t want a valuable lime lesson; I just want an ice cream!
speaker: Bluey

quote: I slipped on my beans.
speaker: Bingo

quote: Oh biscuits!
speaker: Bandit

quote: Here come the grannies!
speaker: Bluey

quote: When you put something beautiful out into the world, it’s no longer yours really.
speaker: Bandit

quote: Ah, duck cake!
speaker: Bandit

quote: But do yourself a favor. Don’t work hard if you can work smart.
speaker: Bandit

quote: Cheese and crackers!
speaker: Bandit

quote: For real life?
speaker: Bluey
